modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to connect to network printer after accidental deletion.

full_description_text: The user accidentally deleted the network printer and is unable to find it for reinstallation. They are currently unable to print and have reported that printing has become very slow. The user needs assistance to add the printer back to their computer.
short_description: Unable to connect to network printer after accidental deletion.
description: The user accidentally deleted the network printer and is unable to find it for reinstallation. They are currently unable to print and have reported that printing has become very slow. The user needs assistance to add the printer back to their computer.
